codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature definition, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit 2ac2e86b58548b7389dbe0537d818f122ada813e. The change is narrowly scoped to keep the final foundation follow-up regression run aligned with the env precedence contract by reusing the existing prefixed-vs-legacy assertion inside TestEnvFilePrecedence, while the previously-added CLI foundation tests continue to cover help/version/source-registry/output-format behavior. I did not find any high-confidence actionable defects in scope.

summary: Pass. The follow-up feature correctly tightens the final foundation regression coverage so the env-file precedence suite also exercises prefixed-over-legacy resolution and empty-prefixed masking, and I found no blocking or non-blocking code defects in the reviewed diff.
